title: i keep hearing about this fresh air ele for wvw, what is that?

turns.userText: i keep hearing about this fresh air ele for wvw, what is that?
turns.agentText:
**Fresh Air** is a playstyle built around an Air Magic trait that instantly resets your Air attunement cooldown on a critical hit — letting you chain Air burst skills far more often than a normal Elementalist.

Per the GW2 wiki, the **Fresh Air** trait does two things on crit while in Air attunement:
- **100% recharge reduction** — Air attunement resets immediately (no split; identical in WvW)
- **+250 Ferocity** for 5 seconds — boosting your crit damage right at the moment you burst

The loop in practice: swap to Air → land your big Air skill (e.g. Lightning Strike, Invoke Lightning on Catalyst) → crit resets Air instantly → swap to another attunement briefly for a secondary skill → swap back to Air and burst again. You're cycling Air far faster than the normal 10-15s cooldown.

**In WvW roaming, it shows up on multiple Elementalist specs** (per MetaBattle, current as of June 2, 2026):

| Build | Tier | Rating |
|---|---|---|
| Fresh Air Cata Roamer (Catalyst) | Great | 5 |
| S/F Fresh Air Roamer (Core Ele) | Good | 4.7 |
| Fresh Air Roamer (Weaver) | Good | 4.3 |

**Fresh Air Catalyst** (Great/5) is the top-rated variant right now — Catalyst's **Jade Sphere** and **Invoke Lightning** are extremely high-damage Air skills that benefit most from the reset loop.

**Core Scepter/Focus** (Good/4.7) is the classic entry point — Scepter gives ranged access to Lightning Strike and Shockwave, Focus contributes defensive skills, and you don't need an elite spec to run it.

Want me to pull the full build details on any of these — gear, traits, and sigils — via `meta_search`?
